what_it_does: Vitest test suite that asserts the version declared in package.json is mirrored exactly by the VERSION export in src/version.ts, the version field in .claude-plugin/plugin.json, and the plugins[0].version field in .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.
observations: package.json is treated as the single source of truth for version.
Three separate version-bearing artifacts are checked against pkg.version.
Uses Node fs/path/url helpers to resolve repository-relative paths from import.meta.url.
Imports VERSION from ../src/version.js at test time.
A small readJson helper centralizes JSON loading.
standouts: Single-source-of-truth enforcement via an automated test.
Cross-artifact version consistency check covering a runtime constant and plugin manifests.
conventions: Repository-relative path resolution derived from import.meta.url.
JSON.parse(readFileSync(..., 'utf-8')) helper for loading manifest files.
concerns: readJson returns any, losing type safety.
Tests read files from disk, making them integration-style and sensitive to filesystem state.
Hard-coded marketplace.plugins[0] index could break if manifest ordering changes.
notes: A guardrail test ensuring every version surface stays synchronized with package.json.
questions: Is src/version.ts generated, or must it be manually kept in sync?
Is .claude-plugin/marketplace.json guaranteed to always contain at least one plugins entry?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to make package.json the version source of truth and verify other files match; the file does exactly that.
intention_signals: Prevent drift between package metadata, compiled version constant, and plugin marketplace manifests by encoding the invariant as a test.
contribution: Provides an automated, file-local assertion that package.json version is propagated to the runtime VERSION constant and both Claude plugin manifest files.
summary_for_embedding: Vitest test in company/recollection/test/version-consistency.test.ts that enforces package.json as the version source of truth by comparing it against src/version.ts and two .claude-plugin manifest files.
intention_for_embedding: To catch version mismatches between package metadata, compiled version export, and plugin marketplace manifests before release.

symbols.does: Reads and parses a JSON file relative to the repository root.
symbols.description: A small helper that joins the given relative path under REPO_ROOT, reads it with UTF-8 encoding, and returns the parsed JSON as any. It is used by the tests to load package.json and the plugin manifest files.
